mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patient_doctor_favorite(patient_card_id, doctor_id, create_time) VALUES(#{patientCardId}, #{doctorId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT d.id AS id, d.name AS name, d.photo AS photo, d.job AS job, d.remark AS remark, d.description AS description, d.tel AS tel, FORMAT(p.price_1, 2) AS price, DATE_FORMAT(f.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS favoriteTime FROM patient_doctor_favorite f JOIN doctor d ON f.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN doctor_price p ON p.doctor_id = d.id WHERE f.patient_card_id = #{patientCardId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC, f.id DESC LIMIT #{length} OFFSET #{start}
